markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content feedback and introduce new performance tracking dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** The content strategy now focuses on business impact and a broad product view (beyond note-taking), not just tone. GrowthX will execute the full content plan, with Sarah providing high-level feedback in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility Gap:** Read.ai's LLM citation rate is 1% vs. competitors' \~20%. This gap is caused by insufficient educational content; the solution is to publish more blog posts and knowledge base articles.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**New Performance Dashboards:** Two new dashboards are live: Scrunch (for LLM visibility) and Looker (for traditional SEO/GA4). Aida will send Sarah an invite to the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Feedback

  - [**Calibration Feedback:** Sarah's feedback on the enterprise search blog post was content-focused, not tone-focused.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [**Expand Product View:** Position the product beyond note-taking to include all inputs for enterprise search.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [**Drive to Business Impact:** Frame the AI platform as a "must-have" for business velocity and profitability, not a "nice-to-have."](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [**Use Clear Examples:** Avoid jargon and ensure examples are accurate to prevent user distraction.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [**Airtable Hub & Spoke Model:** Aida updated Airtable to show content clusters (hubs) and related articles (spokes) for better organization.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**Content Approval Process:** The process shifts from per-article approval to full execution by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To support a year-long, high-volume content program.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [**New Workflow:** Sarah will skim topics in Airtable and comment on any to de-prioritize.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

### Performance Tracking Dashboards

  - [**Scrunch (LLM Visibility):** Monitors Read.ai's presence in LLM responses (Claude, Gemini, etc.).](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Key Metrics:** Position, sentiment, and citations.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [**Citation Gap:** Read.ai's 1% citation rate is far below competitors' \~20%.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
          - [**Cause:** Insufficient educational content on the website.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
          - [**Solution:** Increase content volume. A cybersecurity client with 1,000+ URLs has a 15% citation rate.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Insight:** A recent spike in citations (Nov 19) coincided with a news event and a YouTube influencer video, showing the impact of external brand visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [**Looker (SEO & GA4):** Aggregates data from Google Search Console and GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [**Key Reports:**](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
          - [**GA4 Overview:** Tracks sessions vs. engaged sessions (\>10s, scroll, or click).](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
          - [**Non-Branded Search:** Monitors organic traffic from keywords without "read.ai."](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
          - [**Conversions:** Shows GA4 events. Some event names are unclear (e.g., "meeting report"), likely capturing logged-in state events.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
          - [**Cohort Report:** Will track the performance of GrowthX-published content.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
          - [**Query Report:** Identifies new keyword opportunities from existing search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [Revise the enterprise search blog post based on Sarah's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [Send Sarah an invite to the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [Export the full list of Scrunch prompts for Sarah's review.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**Sarah:**](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [Review the Airtable content plan and comment on any topics to de-prioritize.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [Tag David in Slack to clarify the meaning of custom GA4 conversion events.](https://fathom.video/share/cdFmgjTZtKZyJh7xP_ByKyab-zsefLjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
